default_escalation: ambiguous requirements, security-sensitive changes, external publishing, repeated failures, or user-requested deep review

adt-android-e2e.reason: Android E2E visual diagnosis requires interpretation of UI state, device behavior, and test failures.

adt-android-fold-adapter.reason: Foldable adaptation work requires layout, lifecycle, and device-state reasoning.

adt-android-i18n.reason: Hardcoded-string audits and resource generation are mostly mechanical.
adt-android-i18n.escalation: translation semantics, plural rules, or locale-sensitive behavior need product judgment

adt-gradle-build-performance.reason: Gradle performance audits are mostly structured diagnostics.
adt-gradle-build-performance.escalation: multi-module build architecture or dependency strategy changes are required

dt-code-note.reason: Adding Chinese comments is a localized, low-risk source annotation task.

dt-execute-loop.reason: Loop orchestration requires safety, stop-condition, and result-audit judgment.

dt-init.reason: Project initialization requires stack detection, rules synthesis, and scoped enforcement judgment.

dt-init-root.reason: Multi-repository initialization requires repository boundary and policy judgment.

dt-local-worktree.reason: Worktree creation and merge-script generation are procedural.
dt-local-worktree.escalation: source whitelist inference is ambiguous or push-ban policy needs redesign

dt-project-skills.reason: Skill deduplication, overlap detection, and merge proposals require semantic judgment.

dt-push.reason: Commit, pull, and push workflow is mostly deterministic git automation.
dt-push.escalation: conflicts, divergent history, ambiguous staging, or release-risk decisions appear

dt-study.reason: Capturing a reusable root cause into a source skill requires abstraction judgment.

dt-to-public-cloudflare.reason: Cloudflare tunnel setup is mostly procedural CLI and config work.
dt-to-public-cloudflare.escalation: DNS ownership, credential scope, network exposure, or deployment policy is unclear

dt-update-docs.reason: Documentation generation depends on code-change audit, evidence mapping, and architecture interpretation.

dt-update-remote-plugins.reason: Refreshing generated docs, metadata, install verification, commit, and push are procedural.
dt-update-remote-plugins.escalation: skill audit finds semantic conflicts or install verification fails repeatedly

dt-work-report.reason: Work reports are git-data summarization with fixed wording rules.
